summary: Set 033 Session 1 of 6: shipped the writer side of the orchestrator check-out / check-in migration per the six locked verdicts (H1, H3, H4, OQ1 — H2/OQ2 are reader/doc concerns for Sessions 2 and 6). docs/session-state-schema.md updated with the +2 nested fields (checkedOutAt, lastActivityAt) under orchestrator, a dedicated Check-out / check-in section codifying the H4 identity composite (engine + provider; model + effort are mutable below the identity line), the H3 refusal contract (holder identity + both release paths --force and 'Release Check-Out'), the block-null-when-not-in-progress invariant (OQ1), migration tolerance for pre-Set-033 in-flight files, and the OQ2 documentation-alias note (work_checked_out / work_checked_in are aliases for the existing work_started / closeout_succeeded ledger events). ai_router/session_state.py register_session_start refactored: same-holder branch (engine + provider composite) preserves checkedOutAt + bumps lastActivityAt; fresh / force-override branch sets both to now. ai_router/start_session.py adds the H3 gate (EXIT_CHECKOUT_CONFLICT = 4) after the existing boundary checks (in-flight, closed-session re-open, skip-ahead), the --force flag (force only overrides H3, not the other boundary checks), and best-effort writer-log append at ~/.dabbler/orchestrator-writer.log on force-override (state file is source of truth; log is observability). 7 new unit tests in test_checkout_writer.py cover the six spec-enumerated branches (a-f). Full ai_router suite 640 passed / 1 skipped (no regressions). Round A via gemini-pro $0.038 VERIFIED with no must-fix; all four relevant verdicts traced to file:line citations; all six branches cross-referenced to named test functions; boundary ordering confirmed; edge cases (null provider equality, unwritable writer log, no prior state file, --force on same-holder) all verified. Round B not required. Session 1 closes inside its $0.05-$0.15 forecast band; ~$0.40 of $1.25 total Set 033 NTE band consumed (Session 1 only). Sessions 2-6 remain.
